changeSet.author: Sam Plackett
changeSet.sql:
WITH grouped AS ( SELECT "correlationId", COUNT(*) AS correlation_count, COUNT(DISTINCT "sourceSystem") AS distinct_sourceSystem_count, COUNT(DISTINCT value) AS distinct_value_count FROM public."reportData" WHERE "correlationId" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "correlationId" HAVING COUNT(*) = 3 AND COUNT(DISTINCT "sourceSystem") = 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT value) = 1 ),
base_records AS ( SELECT rd.* FROM public."reportData" rd JOIN grouped g ON rd."correlationId" = g."correlationId" WHERE rd.status = 'Ledger assignment quality check passed' ),
source_ap AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (br."reportDataId") br."reportDataId" AS target_id, s."daxFileName" AS src_daxFileName, s.status AS src_status, s."apValue" AS src_apValue, s."daxImported" AS src_daxImported, s."settledValue" AS src_settledValue, s."ledgerSplit" AS src_ledgerSplit, s."daxPaymentRequestNumber" AS src_daxPaymentRequestNumber, s."daxValue" AS src_daxValue, s."overallStatus" AS src_overallStatus, s."prStillToProcess" AS src_prStillToProcess, s."lastUpdated" AS src_lastUpdated FROM base_records br JOIN public."reportData" s ON s."correlationId" = br."correlationId" AND s."sourceSystem" = br."sourceSystem" AND s."apValue" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY br."reportDataId", s."lastUpdated" DESC NULLS LAST ),
source_ar AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (br."reportDataId") br."reportDataId" AS target_id, s."arValue" AS src_arValue FROM base_records br JOIN public."reportData" s ON s."correlationId" = br."correlationId" AND s."sourceSystem" = br."sourceSystem" AND s."arValue" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY br."reportDataId", s."lastUpdated" DESC NULLS LAST )
UPDATE public."reportData" rd SET "daxFileName" = COALESCE(sa.src_daxFileName, rd."daxFileName"), status = COALESCE(sa.src_status, rd.status), "apValue" = COALESCE(sa.src_apValue, rd."apValue"), "arValue" = COALESCE(sar.src_arValue, rd."arValue"), "daxImported" = COALESCE(sa.src_daxImported, rd."daxImported"), "settledValue" = COALESCE(sa.src_settledValue, rd."settledValue"), "ledgerSplit" = COALESCE(sa.src_ledgerSplit, rd."ledgerSplit"), "daxPaymentRequestNumber" = COALESCE(sa.src_daxPaymentRequestNumber, rd."daxPaymentRequestNumber"), "daxValue" = COALESCE(sa.src_daxValue, rd."daxValue"), "overallStatus" = COALESCE(sa.src_overallStatus, rd."overallStatus"), "prStillToProcess" = COALESCE(sa.src_prStillToProcess, rd."prStillToProcess"), "lastUpdated" = COALESCE(sa.src_lastUpdated, rd."lastUpdated"), "enriched" = 'Y' FROM base_records br LEFT JOIN source_ap sa ON br."reportDataId" = sa.target_id LEFT JOIN source_ar sar ON br."reportDataId" = sar.target_id WHERE rd."reportDataId" = br."reportDataId";

changeSet.author: Sam Plackett
